value.content: This community centres on FLORES-200, Polyglot-Switch, Tokenizer-Equity Index, byte-pair encoding, code-switching, low-resource languages. The cluster is grounded in papers synth-003, synth-005, synth-009, which share these technical concepts. Together they outline a coherent line of work in the cs.CL literature.

This community centres on AdaSpec, Llama-3, Mixture-of-Experts, RA-MoE, draft length, expert routing. The cluster is grounded in papers synth-001, synth-004, which share these technical concepts. Together they outline a coherent line of work in the cs.CL literature.

This community centres on BGE, HA-Retrieve, Listwise-Aligned BGE, bi-encoder, cross-encoder, long-context retrieval. The cluster is grounded in papers synth-002, synth-007, which share these technical concepts. Together they outline a coherent line of work in the cs.CL literature.

This community centres on 1B student, Trace-Critic Distillation, chain-of-thought, knowledge distillation. The cluster is grounded in papers synth-006, which share these technical concepts. Together they outline a coherent line of work in the cs.CL literature.

This community centres on MMLU, Mistral-7B-Instruct, activation steering, prompt injection. The cluster is grounded in papers synth-008, which share these technical concepts. Together they outline a coherent line of work in the cs.CL literature.

This community centres on Constitutional AI, VCC, critique-revise, programmatic verifier. The cluster is grounded in papers synth-010, which share these technical concepts. Together they outline a coherent line of work in the cs.CL literature.
